description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named '🧪 Test' that runs on push and pull request events for the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to test on Linux and macOS with Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12. For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install prerequisites, build the project, run tests, generate a coverage report, and optionally submit it to Coveralls and run pylint.
